_comment: evolve-loop LLM router config — copy to .evolve/llm_config.json and edit, or generate it interactively with /setup.
_comment2: When absent, all phases use profile.cli (default: claude). schema_version 2: per-phase { provider, cli, tier, model }.
_comment3: tier ∈ fast|balanced|deep; model is an alias (haiku|sonnet|opus) or an exact id. cli ∈ claude|gemini|codex|agy.

phases._comment: Per-phase overrides keyed by role. Each tier must sit within the role's profile model_tier_envelope; `evolve setup validate` enforces this.

builder._comment: Adversarial integrity: prefer a DIFFERENT model family for builder vs auditor when you have ≥2 authed CLIs (e.g. builder=agy/Google, auditor=codex/OpenAI).

auditor._comment: Deep tier for adversarial review. Use an exact model id instead of an alias if you want to pin a version.

_fallback._comment: Used for any phase not listed in phases.*.
